name: Biome1_Island
comment: Phase-0 scale layout v3 (2026-06-11). Author corrections: v2 = far intro start + citadel IS the villa; v3 = the sea toss flies EXACTLY along the start->island-center axis and LANDS ON the first arena (M1 sits on that axis south of the island, RunLaunchPoint ~7000 uu behind it, LaunchSpeed ~3300 / pitch ~35). Spiral unwinds east from M1, landing shoulder moved to the EAST rim. Source of truth for build_island.py. Units: uu. Spiral is COUNTERCLOCKWISE.

landscape.extent_note: 201600x201600 centered on origin; create at location (-100800,-100800,-2000)

island.cliff_note: south/southwest face is a near-vertical cliff; citadel(villa) sits on its lip - direct sightline from the toss arc and M1 over open water (M1 hierarchy)

slots.note: toss ORIGIN over water (not a valve start): RunLaunchPoint here, forward aimed EXACTLY at the island center, ballistic arc lands the player on M1's southern approach (~7000 uu, LaunchSpeed ~3300 / pitch ~35 - tune in spike)
ON the start->center axis (author 2026-06-11): the player lands here from the sea toss; pier catches the landing. Entrance faces due south (yaw ~1)
lighthouse doubles as the early-spiral landmark (M3 preview of next maldives)
landing shoulder 40-50 m on the EAST rim: breather, view up the slope, no combat
A5 needs its -700 terrace bowl cut into the slope (8a.2)
THE citadel arena IS the villa (author 2026-06-11): key lore arena on the cliff lip, 160 m; gate counter 3/3 guard antennas, permanent containment field until open

rules.budget_note: start->M1 is the BALLISTIC TOSS (~7000 uu flight), not a valve; maldive hops run ~16-18.5k path (vs doc 5-15k) per the author's drawn trajectory 2026-06-11 - distant island vista the whole spiral
